mission.title: podman-container-tools: docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..] needs to be recreated - option "isolate" has changed'
mission.description: docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..] needs to be recreated - option "isolate" has changed'. This issue affects 13+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for error: `Network "recreatebug_default" needs to be recreated - option "isolate" has changed`

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
**Description**

Since updating podman to 4.2.0 I'm unable to use `docker-compose up -d --force-recreate` when the containers are already running

1.  Have minimal docker-compose.yml e.g.

steps.title: Apply the fix for docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..]…
steps.description:
The workaround here is using this file and obeying the comments:

```yaml
# We assume this exists in /some/path/example/docker-compose.yaml
version: "3.8"
services:
  redis:
    image: "redis:alpine"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:6379:6379"

networks:
  default:
    # Comment lines below if using
```yaml
version: "3.8"
services:
  redis:
    image: "redis:alpine"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:6379:6379"
```

steps.title: Upgrade podman-container-tools to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade podman-container-tools:
```bash
# Check current version
podman --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/containers/podman
```

steps.title: Confirm docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `Network "recreatebug_default" needs to be recreated - option "isolate" has changed` no longer appears.

resolution.summary:
The workaround here is using this file and obeying the comments:

```yaml
# We assume this exists in /some/path/example/docker-compose.yaml
version: "3.8"
services:
  redis:
    image: "redis:alpine"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:6379:6379"

networks:
  default:
    # Comment lines below if using for the 1st time
    external: true
    name: example_default
```

This way, docker-compose won't try
codeSnippets: ERROR: Network "recreatebug_default" needs to be recreated - option "isolate" has changed

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
